params.name: Jiuzhang
params.description:
On Dec 2, 2020 AD, the quantum computer Jiuzhang was completed.
Jiuzhang is a state-of-the-art quantum computer that has one trillion times the speed of the currently most powerful supercomputer when dealing with Gaussian boson sampling. Unlike traditional computers, quantum computers can process multiple coefficients on a single quantum bit simultaneously through quantum superposition, leading to a significant improvement in computing efficiency. Jiuzhang is a breakthrough in the field of qu …
